item.title: Thirty-Fifteen
item.description:
[RELEASE] M3-2025 Autumn -

A House album going through the night.

This is a chill-out feeling Deep House and Garage House album. It made with FL Studio, M8 and KORG Gadget 3.

Bandcamp

item.title: ショートショート異空間333歩
Marron's Day Soundtrack
item.description:
[SOUNDTRACK]

Original soundtrack for Marron's Day, a silly retro adventure game where you're a bunny. The soundtrack was recorded straight from retro hardware!

Explore the town, run errands for your animal friends, and don't let anyone catch you swiping the carrots from the garden (again)!

Bandcamp
Steam

item.title: you're just imagining it SOUNDTRACK
item.description:
[SOUNDTRACK]

The original soundtrack for you're just imagining it, a chronic illness simulator.

Bandcamp
Steam

item.title: sdhizumi at M8 Fest -Live Mix-
item.description:
[RELEASE] M3-2024 Autumn -

M8 Fest was held on 2024/09/07 at Circus Tokyo. I was really enjoyed this gig.
This album has Live Mix that I performed on M8 Fest (rerecording) with unmixed versions each others.

I used 2 units of M8Tracker for that gig but 1 unit is made by myself that based on M8Headless. You can see on the album cover. I called this by H4NDM4T3.
This unit is very memorable as my own memory of this event.

item.title: Technosoft Music Collection - THUNDER FORCE V -
Traceback
item.description:
[RELEASE] M3-2024 Spring -

M8 Fest was held on 2024/09/07 at Circus Tokyo. I was really enjoyed this gig.
This album has Live Mix that I performed on M8 Fest (rerecording) with unmixed versions each others.

I used 2 units of M8Tracker for that gig but 1 unit is made by myself that based on M8Headless. You can see on the album cover. I called this by H4NDM4T3.
This unit is very memorable as my own memory of this event.

item.title: Metal Gear Solid Master Collection Vol.1 Bonus Content
Tiny Bleeps
item.description:
[RELEASE] M3-2023 Spring -

Experience minimal bleep loop music made with source files limited to 1266 bytes!

This album was made with FAMIC on USB.

The source files (MML) are included as a bonus for people who purchase the album. (They are not included for single track purchases.)

What is FAMIC on USB?

FAMIC on USB is a melody IC that can be written in MML. It was created by Prioris LLC. in Japan. It has sine, pulse, triangle, saw, 1-bit noise, and wave ram sound generators. Like with the FC/NES and GB, you can write any MML sequences up to the 1266-byte limit.

item.title: A TAVERN FOR TEA Original Soundtrack
item.description:
[SOUNDTRACK]

The original soundtrack for A TAVERN FOR TEA, a fantasy tea-brewing adventure.

Play as the owner of a fantasy tavern and brew the tea that your customers didn't know they needed.

Bandcamp
Steam

item.title: Selected LSDJ Works
item.description:
[RELEASE] M3-2022 Autumn -

This is my first best album made with LSDj.

I released my first LSDj track in 2014. Since then I have released 9 original albums, 1 collection of reworks, and 1 mixtape.

This album consists of selected tracks from those albums, tracks released on other labels, and a new track.

Get raving with bleeps!

Bandcamp

item.title: a pet shop after dark Soundtrack
item.description:
[SOUNDTRACK]

The original soundtrack for a pet shop after dark, a horror point-and-click adventure game.

Water the plants, feed the pets, and DON'T turn off the lights.

Bandcamp
Steam

item.title: Cool Chiptune VS Cute Chiptune Battle Complation 2 -Cool side-
A HERO AND A GARDEN Original Soundtrack and Remix
item.description:
[SOUNDTRACK]

The original soundtrack and remix album for A HERO AND A GARDEN, a gardening visual novel and clicker game. Play as a fairytale hero and help him garden, since saving the princess didn't go that well.

Harvest berries, complete requests, and repair the town (that you destroyed)!

Bandcamp
Steam

item.title: Mima and Nina's Chocolate Workshop Original Soundtrack
item.description:
[SOUNDTRACK]

Original soundtrack for the visual novel Mima and Nina's Chocolate Workshop

This soundtrack is...exciting, but a little bittersweet? I especially put that mood in the music for the school (Tr.4).

Mima and Nina's Chocolate Workshop is a chocolate-making visual novel. Who will you give your chocolates to this Valentine's Day?

Bandcamp

item.title: Light Chiptune VS Dark Chiptune Battle Complation 2 -Dark Side-
A YEAR OF SPRINGS Soundtrack
item.description:
[SOUNDTRACK]

Original soundtrack for the remastered visual novel trilogy A YEAR OF SPRINGS.

Experience the stories of Haru, Erika, and Manami in A YEAR OF SPRINGS, a visual novel trilogy about a trio of friends navigating their feelings of love, connection, and just wanting to belong.

Bandcamp
Steam

item.title: Famicom Detective Club: The Missing Heir
Famicom Detective Club:Girl Who Stands Behind
Get Right Down
item.description:
[RELEASE]

Inspired by KORG Gadget 2 Plugins... One day after I bought the Gadget, I already had a prototype for this song.

In the Original Mix, I have used the Gadget's synth/samplers except for the bass and some samples on Reaper. (I used Abu Dhabi, Darwin, Glasgow, Memphis, Montpellier, Lexington.)

Early Freeform Mix is a freestyle self-remix, was made with Original Mix's samples on FL Studio.

Enjoy!

Bandcamp

item.title: a letter of challenge Original Soundtrack
item.description:
[SOUNDTRACK]

Original soundtrack for the battle game (?) & visual novel "a letter of challenge".

This time I tried to make a semi-fantastic(?) music.
It was a bit of a challenge...but I hope you enjoyed it.

A LETTER OF CHALLENGE is a battle game (?) & visual novel where you play as a magical girl (with a magical guardian, of course!).

Bandcamp

item.title: TOMATO CLINIC Original Soundtrack
item.description:
[SOUNDTRACK]

Original soundtrack for the visual novel "TOMATO CLINIC".

These tracks are made by YAMAHA MU90 MIDI sound module.
This was often used in the mid 90s to early 2000s for low budget pop music in Japan. I'm also conscious of it on this soundtrack.

TOMATO CLINIC is a visual novel about going on a tour at a vampire blood donation clinic.

Bandcamp

item.title: sdhizumi Reworks Volume.1
item.description:
[RELEASE] M3-2020 Spring -

It's a self-remix album.
Original tracks are selected from those I made between 2012-2014.
(Mainly from "Handy Rave Machine" album. I was a beginner.)

Bandcamp
Booth

item.title: Cool Chiptune VS Cute Chiptune Battle Complation -Cool side-
spring leaves no flowers Soundtrack
item.description:
[SOUNDTRACK]

Original soundtrack for the visual novel "spring leaves no flowers".

"spring leaves no flowers" is a visual novel. Help Manami come to an understanding about herself as she thinks about what friendship and romance mean to her.

Bandcamp

item.title: last day of spring Soundtrack
item.description:
[SOUNDTRACK]

Original soundtrack for the visual novel "last day of spring".

"last day of spring" is a visual novel. Play as Erika, a university student, and join her as she plans a spa day for her transgender friend Haru.

Bandcamp

item.title: Pump Up Your Soul
item.description:
[RELEASE] M3-2019 Spring -

Chiptune meets Happy Hardcore!!

Bandcamp
Booth

item.title: Light Chiptune VS Dark Chiptune Battle Complation -Dark Side-
lilac & her light Soundtrack
item.description:
[SOUNDTRACK]

Not club music. Not chip music. But this is one of my music definitely.

This is the soundtrack of the game "lilac & her light".

I wrote ambient / healing /easy listning style music after some years.
The game is short, but cute and beautiful story. I hope you will play this game!

Bandcamp

item.title: Colorized Dots
item.description:
[RELEASE] M3-2018 Autumn -

Electronic house and techno on LSDj.
This is my first album that use modded GBC.
It includes 5 tracks.

Bandcamp
Booth

item.title: Inverted Negative
item.description:
[RELEASE] M3-2018 Spring -

I was came back to photography in last Fall.
This album is inspired my experience by photography.
It includes 5 tracks.

Bandcamp
Booth

item.title: Minimal Chip
item.description:
[RELEASE] M3-2017 Autumn -

This album's theme is minimal electronica.
It includes 5 tracks.

Bandcamp
Booth

item.title: Hardchip Raver
item.description:
[RELEASE] M3-2017 Spring -

Chiptune Hardcore Techno Album (composed on Gameboy / DMG)
The album include 5 hardcore techno style chiptune tracks!
Rave on! Rave on!

Booth
